videos.title: What Is AI? (And How Does It Work?)
videos.description: An engaging animated overview of what Artificial Intelligence is, how it's learned (machine learning, neural networks at a high level), and its incredible potential, making complex concepts easy to grasp.

videos.title: What Is AI? Crash Course AI #1
videos.description: The first episode of Crash Course AI provides a structured introduction to defining AI, its historical context, and distinguishing between different types such as Narrow AI and General AI.

videos.title: What is AI? (Artificial Intelligence) - IBM Technology
videos.description: A concise and professional explanation from IBM, covering the definition of AI, its major sub-disciplines like Machine Learning and Deep Learning, and a look at common real-world applications.

videos.title: AI, Explained.
videos.description: This video demystifies how AI actually learns. It provides an accessible introduction to core machine learning concepts like supervised vs. unsupervised learning and a simplified look at neural networks.

videos.title: Build a ChatGPT like AI App in Python with Streamlit
videos.description: Learn to quickly develop interactive web applications for your AI models using Streamlit. This tutorial walks through building a ChatGPT-like interface, demonstrating how to connect an LLM to a user-friendly frontend.

videos.title: Gradio - Build a UI for your ML Models with Python (Quick Start Guide)
videos.description: Discover Gradio as an alternative to Streamlit for creating simple, shareable web interfaces for your machine learning models in minutes. This video covers the basics of setting up a UI for inference.

videos.title: OpenAI Python API Crash Course (GPT-3/4 Tutorial)
videos.description: Get hands-on with the OpenAI Python API to integrate powerful language models like GPT-3 and GPT-4 into your applications. This crash course covers making API calls, understanding responses, and building basic LLM interactions.

videos.title: LangChain Crash Course for Beginners
videos.description: Learn the fundamentals of LangChain, a powerful framework for developing applications powered by large language models. This course introduces chains, agents, memory, and how to combine various components to build more complex and stateful AI apps.
